name: claudex
description: Run Claude Code from Codex for adversarial review, feedback triage, and in-scope fixes.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code to adversarially review Codex changes.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for invoking Claude Code as a read-only adversarial reviewer, triaging findings as external feedback, applying accepted in-scope fixes, and validating the result.
defaultPrompt: Use $claudex:adversarial-review to have Claude adversarially review my current changes.
Use $claudex:adversarial-review to run a Claude Code review of this branch.
